purpose: Define the final dry-run gate before any real registry update, plus rollback/recovery rehearsal requirements.
hard_rules: Explicit apply gate is dry-run only in this phase.
This phase must not write registry files.
This phase must not mutate website source, D1, R2, KV, Workers, Cloudflare, git, or deployment state.
Ready means ready for a later explicit real-apply phase, not real apply now.
Real apply requires separate human-approved or authorized controlled apply context.
